title: Add gh CLI helper functions
description: ghAuthCheck, ghCurrentUser, ghListOrgs, ghListRepos and ghRepo struct
acceptance:
- ghAuthCheck returns nil on success, HintError with install/auth hints on failure
- ghCurrentUser returns login, ghListOrgs returns paginated org logins
- ghListRepos returns []ghRepo with nameWithOwner/isFork/isArchived fields

title: Implement filterUntracked core logic
description: Pure filtering function and custom discover filter matching
acceptance:
- filterUntracked deduplicates by case-insensitive nameWithOwner, applies fork/archived AND filters, subtracts manifest repos
- matchesDiscoverFilter matches owner/ prefix and owner/name exactly, both case-insensitive

title: Wire discover cobra command
description: Command handler with flags, human output, progress, exit codes
acceptance:
- Cobra command with --forks, --archived boolean flags registered on root
- Human output grouped by owner with (personal) label and progress on stderr
- Exit 0 no untracked, exit 1 found, exit 2 on error

title: Add JSON output to discover
description: JSON and compact mode output paths
acceptance:
- JSON output via SuccessResult with summary (untracked, owners_scanned, total_remote, total_manifest) and repos array
- --compact omits repos array; --filter narrows output via matchesDiscoverFilter

title: Add filterUntracked unit tests
acceptance:
- 10 tests: subtraction, all-tracked, fork exclude/include, archived exclude/include, case-insensitive, dedup, fork+archived AND, empty manifest
- All pass via go test ./cmd/ -run TestFilterUntracked

title: Add discover integration tests
acceptance:
- 5 tests: gh-not-found exit 2 with hint, JSON schema structure, compact no repos key, filter nonexistent exit 0, exit code 1 with dummy manifest
- gh-dependent tests skip when gh unavailable

title: Update CLAUDE.md for discover
description: Add discover to Commands, Flags, Behavior, Structure sections
acceptance:
- CLAUDE.md lists discover in Commands, Per-Command Flags, Command Behavior sections
- Project Structure includes discover.go and discover_test.go
